evidence_summary: Released Feb 5 2026. 1M token context window. Native agent teams = multiple agents coordinating tasks in parallel. 128K token output. Outperforms GPT-5.2 by 144 Elo on GDPval-AA. MCP Tool Search = lazy loading MCP servers (top requested feature). $5/M input $25/M output tokens. Agent teams in Claude Code = vibe working era begins. Product: agent team workflow templates + MCP server marketplace + Claude Code tutorial course. Content: benchmark breakdowns + agent teams demos + Claude vs GPT-5.2 comparisons. CNBC calls it 'vibe working' era.

6700 sexualized images/hour generated via Grok. Malaysia + Indonesia banned Grok. California ordered immediate stop. Coalition demands federal ban Feb 2 2026. EU formal DSA proceeding opened. Reuters retest: 45/55 prompts still produce sexualized images after 'fixes'. Malwarebytes confirms Feb 2026 still broken. Content: AI safety commentary + platform regulation analysis + deepfake detection tools. Coin: AI safety tokens may pump on regulatory news. Massive engagement farming window on AI ethics content.

Expected mid-Feb 2026 post-Lunar New Year. R2 = multimodal reasoning (vision + audio + video). 100+ language reasoning. DeepSeek kicked off 2026 with paper on training bigger models for less. Manifold prediction market tracking release date. V4-thinking integrates R2 engine. Last DeepSeek release crashed US tech stocks. Content: model comparison content + implications analysis. Coin: DeepSeek-adjacent tokens pump on release day. Product: DeepSeek integration tools. TIME-SENSITIVE: days away.

Cursor at $29.3B valuation (Series D Nov 2025). $1B ARR in 24 months = fastest SaaS ever. Writes 1B lines of code/day. OpenAI acquired Windsurf for $3B. 41% of all global code is AI-generated. YC W25: 21% of startups have 91% AI-generated codebases. Lovable hit $100M ARR in 8 months. Replit $10M to $100M in 9 months. Collins Dictionary 2025 Word of Year. Product: vibe coding course + template marketplace + build-for-you service ($300-$5000/build). Content: build-in-public + tutorials + tool comparisons.

MCP moved to Linux Foundation (Agentic AI Foundation - AAIF). Competing protocols: IBM ACP + Google A2A + UTCP. Nearly every company adopted MCP in 2025. MCP Apps = interactive UIs inside chat windows (successor to MCP-UI). Claude Code MCP Tool Search solves context bloat. Security vulnerabilities still dogging the protocol. Product: MCP server marketplace + MCP security audit tools + MCP Apps templates. Content: protocol comparison guides + MCP tutorial series + 'build your first MCP server' content.

GPT-5 based Computer-Using Agent. Vision-Action Loop = screenshots + visual reasoning. 87% success rate on complex web tasks. Can book travel + manage groceries + orchestrate logistics. Anthropic Computer Use + Google Jarvis = competitors. Feb 13 2026: GPT-4o + GPT-4.1 + o4-mini being retired.
